item.title: Inspecting a Hitachi ZX225 idler failure
item.description: An inspection of an idler failure on a Hitachi ZX225 highlights wear, damage, and potential causes. What can be learned from this type of equipment issue?

media:content.media:title: Inspecting a Hitachi ZX225 idler failure
media:content.media:description: An inspection of an idler failure on a Hitachi ZX225 highlights wear, damage, and potential causes. What can be learned from this type of equipment issue?

item.title: Building a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer Tank
item.description: See how a durable tank is fabricated for a heavy-duty parts washer, focusing on strength and functionality. What materials and methods are used for long-term use?

media:content.media:description: See how a durable tank is fabricated for a heavy-duty parts washer, focusing on strength and functionality. What materials and methods are used for long-term use?

item.title: Large Lathe Test in Action
item.description: A large industrial lathe undergoes testing to evaluate performance and precision in a workshop setting. How do engineers verify accuracy on machines of this scale?

item.description: Watch the process of machining a new cylinder rod with precision techniques used in industrial applications. What steps ensure accuracy and durability?

item.title: Repairing a Tilt Bucket for Heavy Use
item.description: A tilt bucket is repaired and reinforced to handle demanding conditions. The process restores function and reliability for heavy equipment work. How important is reinforcement?

media:content.media:description: A tilt bucket is repaired and reinforced to handle demanding conditions. The process restores function and reliability for heavy equipment work. How important is reinforcement?

item.title: Building a Heavy-Duty Tailstock Chuck
item.description: A custom tailstock chuck is built from scratch, designed for strength and precision in machining tasks. A practical solution for demanding workshop needs. Would you build one?

media:content.media:description: A custom tailstock chuck is built from scratch, designed for strength and precision in machining tasks. A practical solution for demanding workshop needs. Would you build one?

item.title: Excavator Arm and Bucket Restoration
item.description: A full restoration of an excavator arm and bucket brings worn components back to working condition. Careful repair improves durability and extends equipment life. What stands out?

item.title: Precision Machining a Heavy-Duty Chuck, Pt. 2
item.description: Precision machining continues on a heavy-duty chuck, refining surfaces and ensuring proper function. Each step is key to achieving balance and strength. What’s the hardest part?

item.title: Inspecting a Cracked Hydraulic Cylinder
item.description: A detailed inspection reveals damage inside a hydraulic cylinder, highlighting wear points and possible causes. Understanding failures helps prevent future issues. What caused the crack?

item.title: A Major Makeover for a Bucket Arm
item.description: A worn bucket arm undergoes a full rebuild, restoring strength and structure through cutting, welding, and reshaping. The process extends service life and improves performance. Which step matters most?

media:content.media:title: A Major Makeover for a Bucket Arm
media:content.media:description: A worn bucket arm undergoes a full rebuild, restoring strength and structure through cutting, welding, and reshaping. The process extends service life and improves performance. Which step matters most?

item.title: Levelling a Large Lathe for Work
item.description: A large lathe is carefully levelled to ensure accuracy and stability before machining begins. Proper setup is essential for precision and long-term performance. Why is alignment so critical?
